title: App Settings - General
scenario: Verify that tapping the hamburger icon and selecting General opens a screen with Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses sections, and that going back returns to the Poly Lens Menu.
steps: 1. Tap the App Settings icon (hamburger icon).
3. Observe the new screen that opens.
4. Verify the screen displays the following sections: Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses.
5. Navigate back (e.g., tap the back button or gesture).
6. Verify that the user is returned to the Poly Lens Menu.
expected: Tapping the App Settings icon and selecting General opens a new screen displaying the sections: Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses. Going back returns the user to the Poly Lens Menu.
